comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: As a developer, I want PyPixoo aligned with the official Pixoo API, so that native capabilities (including built-in fonts) are supported and documented. Definition of done: ShowDoc export + command matrix, built-in font registry and overlay APIs, additional device/channel/app commands as per matrix, CLI/docs updates, and 100% spec coverage.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Progress update: Added ShowDoc export + generated markdown/raw/index; built command matrix; implemented built-in font registry, overlay sequencing, and new system/apps features; added Pixoo64 device/channel/tool wrappers and CLI/docs updates; updated tests. Behave run failed locally due to missing editable install; pytest tests added and passing.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Added Sphinx docs (docs/sphinx), expanded docstrings for device/client paths, added per-capability real-device demos, updated README/demos docs, and gitignored docs/_build + docs/api/showdoc. Removed ShowDoc exports from repo (kept command matrix).

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Closing as obsolete per user request during board cleanup.
